Allow: /
Allow: /about

Allow: /security-hotline

Allow: /marketplace
Allow: /knowledge

# Keep dashboards and auth flows private
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /verify-otp
Disallow: /verify-email
Disallow: /forgot-password
Disallow: /welcome
